title: Raspberry Pi Roof Rack Sensor Mount

lumber.note: 1 crossbar 32 in, 1 upright 24 in, 2 braces 11 in top edge at 45 deg

crossbar_clamp.description: Holes for roof-rack mounting bolts through crossbar (flat face)
crossbar_clamp.note: 3/8-16 carriage bolt clearance. Centred on crossbar length. Adjust spacing to match roof-rack bar centres.

upright_pipe_screw.description: Pilot holes through upright face to pin pipe to upright, on centreline
upright_pipe_screw.note: 3/16 pilot for #10 × 3 wood screw. Both holes on X=0 centreline, drilled along Y. 6-in and 18-in down from top of upright. Screw passes through pipe wall into wood.

brace_screw.description: Pilot holes through 45-degree brace face into crossbar and upright
brace_screw.note: 3/16 pilot for #10 wood screw. Hole axis perpendicular to the 45-degree brace face. 2 per brace end × 2 brace ends per brace × 2 braces = 8 total.

upright_clamp_slot.description: Hose-clamp band pass-through holes at each end of the upright
upright_clamp_slot.note: 0.5-in clearance holes for clamp band, 1.5-in apart centred on upright width (X=0). Two holes at each end (top and bottom) drilled along Y axis.

corner_brace_screw.description: Pilot holes for 3x3-inch L-bracket screws at T-joint between upright and crossbar
corner_brace_screw.note: 4 brackets × 4 holes each. Holes at 28% and 72% along the 3-in arm. Two brackets per side of the T-joint.
